title: Exteleon Mod
description: Notes from story characters, biomes, blocks, armor, weapons and tools. Mechanics with movement in time (the world of the past was created through the portal of time). There are a huge number of new atmospheric structures.
body:
Background and introduction

The action takes place in the most ordinary world, the game character accidentally finds the grave of the bright Entrepreneur Exteleon, who went missing many years ago. In the same place, the player will find a plate and a note that he cannot read due to dried blood. In the future, you have to find many more structures with notes in order to put them all into one big picture, figure it out in order to enter into a struggle between the undead and the light. In addition to all this, you must accidentally activate the “mod functions”, due to the fact that some entities will write to you in the chat, they will also help a lot in development.

The authors chose not to tell all the tricks and secrets of this mod, so that the players could explore everything themselves, so this article will only cover the basics.

Commands


First of all, when you enter the world, a welcome note will appear in the chat with auxiliary commands.
Let's start with the commands that the developers have added:

/developer_helpE and /developer_helpR - tell about all mod commands in Russian and English.
/developer_introductionE and /developer_introductionR - shows a short introduction to the modification in Russian and English.
/developer_thanks - this command brings up a menu where you can see the developers of the mod.
/developer_contacts - Shows team contacts.

Decor and cosmetics


As I said earlier, in addition to the plot, in addition to the plot, there are decorative and cosmetic items in the modification. There are only 9 of them, some of them can spawn particles:

Statue of Exteleon - Exteleon's patriotism is unmatched!
The statue of King Exteleon is a real man who ruled well.
Wall Maria: miniature - let's give our hearts!
The statue of Henos is a statue of the king of the undead, he does not need a crown to show all his greatness.
Rusmey's sword in stone - the sacred sword of the hero was stuck in stone after his death.
Backpack - did they make such chic backpacks in the Middle Ages ?!
Devil Wings are a real cosmetic item for the undead. Don't worry, not a single devil was hurt.
The Technique Scroll is a bundle from the Naruto universe, just don't try to reveal it!
Absorption claws - as they say, fly like a bee, and pity like a bee.

Unusual things


The modification also added things and tools that diversify the game:

Pickaxe of Henos - Crafted with two new ores, as well as a Gilded Stick (can be crafted with Gold Nuggets), a Vial of Henos' Gift (found in structures) and a new alloy element that takes a very long time to craft. But the pickaxe is worth it, because it cuts the bedrock in half!

Undead Shuriken is a very strong item that is created from rotten sticks (can be found in the undead biome), an iron ingot, and also with the help of dark nickel nuggets. From crafting, you can take four shurikens at once, which you can throw.

The sword of the hero Rusmey is the same sword that was depicted on the decorative model. It deals a whopping 10 damage with an attack speed of 2. On top of all this, if your target is an undead, then it will deal an additional 5 damage to it, and also set it on fire.

Sacred ax - this thing is considered combat, you won’t chop a tree with it, but you can chop the undead, because it has as many as 30 damage!

New potions - how could it be without them! There are only two potions: Henos and Exteleon. By drinking them, you will get a lot of buffs from the vanilla game. Their crafts will be below in the form of screenshots. There is only one problem, for reasons unknown to me, there are no such recipes in the mods for viewing crafts. However, I checked and the recipes are authentic.

Worlds and biomes


Since the authors of the mod do not want to reveal all the cards, I will talk about worlds and biomes very briefly.

First undead biome. It can be found in the regular world, it spawns quite often, and with it the structures with notes. It features new types of foliage and tree trunks that can be crafted into planks and then into sticks. All types of hostile monsters will spawn here.

The second biome is associated with an anomaly. Here you can find unusual water that removes all effects from you, like milk, as well as unusual foliage, the property of which I will not tell, experiment!

And the last, third biome is associated with the bright side of this world, it is not completely rotten yet. Here you will not find a single bad mob, the perfect place to relax and unwind! When you enter it, relaxing music will play.

In the game you will continue to have two new worlds: the undead and the past. In the world of the undead, everything is very clear, there is only one hostile biome, which I spoke about earlier, and alarming music. Well, and yet, they say that until now there is the spirit of the king of the undead - Henos.

The second world is connected with the past, it is something like the upper world, but outdated. This dimension is obligatory for research, since it will be possible to notice the same structures there as in the usual one, but only in a newer form, as if someone still lives in them. As you understand, the player will be moved to the past.

P.S. This mod was made with MCreator.
